meta.notes: NHS RTT monthly files consistently contain 150k-200k rows. Alert if count is outside this range — may indicate a partial download or format change.
NHS England RTT full extract has 121 columns. If this changes, NHS England has changed the format and all downstream models must be reviewed.
Period is the reporting month identifier. Never null.
Period must match format RTT-MonthName YYYY e.g. RTT-January-2026. If format changes our date parsing in staging will break.
RTT Part Types are fixed. Any new value indicates NHS England has introduced a new pathway type requiring model review.
Every row must have a provider ODS code. Null provider codes cannot be attributed to a trust.
Total All is the primary patient count. Never null in source data — null here indicates a structural issue.
Individual trust-specialty patient counts should not exceed 500k. Values above this indicate data corruption or format errors.
Provider codes should have low uniqueness ratio — each trust appears many times (once per specialty per pathway type). Very high uniqueness would indicate code-level rather than trust-level data.
Every row must have a treatment function code identifying the clinical specialty.

meta.description: Expectation suite for NHS RTT raw full extract CSV files. Validates structural integrity before BigQuery load. Maintained by the data engineering team.
